- observable feature: wavy, undulating lines
- observable feature: textured surface
- observable feature: reddish-brown color
</features>
<kb>
- IF [observable visual features = wavy, undulating lines AND textured surface] THEN [17]
- IF [observable visual features = irregular, broken surface with dark patches] THEN [32]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule 1 fires because the Query Image shows wavy, undulating lines and a textured surface, which matches the features described in the IF condition for class 17.
</rule_check>
<response>17</response>

<features>
- observable feature: presence of multiple circular depressions on a paved surface
- observable feature: surface texture appears worn and uneven
- observable feature: visible patches of lighter material filling some depressions
</features>
<kb>
- IF [presence of multiple circular depressions on a paved surface AND surface texture appears worn and uneven] THEN [32]
- IF [presence of parallel linear grooves or strips on a surface] THEN [17]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- Rule for class 32 fires because the Query Image shows multiple circular depressions on a paved surface and the surface texture is worn and uneven, matching the observable features described in the rule.
</rule_check>
<response>32</response>
